hello.pdf is the sample PDF distributed in
github.com/ledongthuc/pdf/examples/read_plain_text/pdf_test.pdf
under the BSD-3-Clause license.

Copyright (c) 2009 The Go Authors. All rights reserved.

Used here verbatim for deterministic unit-testing of the PDF text-layer
extractor in pdf.go. See go.mod for the corresponding library import.
